title: BoatHandsFree
description: Allows players to attack, use items, and interact while rowing a boat.
body:
**BoatHandsFree** is a **Minecraft client-side mod** that removes **operation restrictions while rowing a boat**.

In vanilla Minecraft, players cannot **attack, use items, or interact with entities and blocks** while rowing a boat, which can lead to a negative gameplay experience.

This mod **removes these restrictions**, allowing players to attack, use items, and interact with entities and blocks while rowing a boat, making boat operations more flexible.
